channel.title: Advisor Panel on IDPicker Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Advisor Panel on IDPicker Docs

item.title: Advisor Login and Dashboard
item.description:
This guide covers advisor access, role-based session behavior, and first dashboard checks.

A) Advisor Login (Click-by-Click)

  1. Open advisor login URL from Access URLs.
  2. Click Email field and enter advisor email.
  3. Click Password field and enter password.
  4. Click Sign In.
  5. Wait for session initialization.
  6. Confirm redirect to dashboard.

Expected result:

  • Advisor session is loaded with role and permission set.
  • User lands on advisor dashboard.

If login fails:

  • Re-check email/password.
  • Confirm account status is active.
  • Use request/reset password flow if needed.

B) First-Time Password Setup

For invited advisors/sub-advisors:

item.title: Students and Bulk Import
item.description:
This guide covers student search/filter, profile access, group assignment, and bulk import.

A) Open Students List

  1. Sign in as advisor.
  2. In sidebar, click Students.
  3. Wait for student table/cards to load.

B) Search and Filter Students (Click-by-Click)

  1. Click search input.
  2. Type name or email keyword.
  3. Apply filters as needed (groups, chat status, assessment signals, date, location, etc.).
  4. Apply sorting (name, email, joined date, and other available fields).
  5. Review narrowed result list.

C) Open Student Detail

  1. Click a student row/card.
  2. Open student detail page.
  3. Review profile and activity context.

D) Update Student Group Membership

  1. From Students list, open group assignment action.
  2. Check/uncheck target groups.
  3. Save membership update.
  4. Confirm changes in student row/detail.

E) Bulk Import Students from Excel

  1. In Students page, click Bulk Students/Import.
  2. Upload .xlsx or .xls file.
  3. Wait for preview parsing.
  4. Validate required columns exist:
    • email
    • first_name
    • last_name
  5. Select rows to import.
  6. Click Bulk Create/Import.
  7. Wait for success summary.

Import Validation Notes

  • Max file size is limited.
  • Invalid file type is rejected.
  • Rows with missing required fields are skipped or flagged.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Import file uploaded but no preview appears. A: Confirm Excel format and header names match expected fields.

item.title: Groups Management
item.description:
Groups help advisors organize students into cohorts for assignment and communication.

A) Open Groups

  1. In sidebar, click Groups.
  2. Wait for groups list to load.

B) Create Group (Click-by-Click)

  1. Click Create Group.
  2. Enter group name.
  3. Enter optional description.
  4. Select student members.
  5. Click Save.
  6. Confirm new group appears in list.

C) Edit Group

  1. Open target group.
  2. Click Edit.
  3. Update name/description/members.
  4. Save changes.
  5. Confirm updated values in list/detail.

D) Delete Group

  1. Open group actions.
  2. Click Delete.
  3. Confirm deletion prompt.
  4. Verify group is removed.

E) Best Practice for Group Strategy

  • Create groups by grade, track, or campaign objective.
  • Keep names consistent and searchable.
  • Review membership regularly.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: I cannot add a student to group. A: Check permission scope or reload student source list.

item.title: Forms and Responses
item.description:
This guide covers managing advisor forms, publication state, and responses.

A) Open Forms Module

  1. In sidebar, click Forms.
  2. Wait for forms list and summary counters.

B) Search and Filter Forms

  1. Use search input for form title/metadata.
  2. Filter by status (draft, published, archived, all).
  3. Review counts (total forms, published forms, total responses).

C) Create New Form

  1. Click Create New Form.
  2. Enter title and description.
  3. Add/edit form fields in builder.
  4. Save as draft.
  5. Publish when ready.

D) Manage Existing Forms

  1. Open form from list.
  2. Edit structure/content if still editable.
  3. Publish/unpublish per workflow.
  4. Delete form using action menu and confirmation.

E) Review Responses

  1. Open form.
  2. Click Responses.
  3. Review respondent list and submitted answers.
  4. Open individual response detail for deeper review.

F) Preview Form

  1. Open form actions.
  2. Click Preview.
  3. Validate visual and field behavior before distribution.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Response count does not update immediately. A: Refresh list and confirm responses endpoint load completed.

item.title: Resources Management
item.description:
Resources lets advisors upload, organize, and assign files to students.

A) Open Resources

  1. In sidebar, click Resources.
  2. Wait for resource list/grid.

B) Upload a Resource (Click-by-Click)

  1. Click Upload Resource.
  2. Choose file from local device.
  3. Enter metadata (name/description/category as available).
  4. Select visibility/assignment mode.
  5. Click Upload.
  6. Confirm item appears in list.

C) Filter and Sort Resources

  1. Use search input (filename/title).
  2. Apply file-type filter.
  3. Apply size and visibility filters.
  4. Choose sort mode (date/name/size).
  5. Toggle list/grid view if needed.

D) Assign Resource to Students

  1. Open resource actions.
  2. Click Assign to Students.
  3. Select one or more students.
  4. Save assignment.
  5. Confirm visibility reflects assignment mode.

E) Delete Resource

  1. Open resource actions.
  2. Click Delete.
  3. Confirm modal.
  4. Verify resource is removed.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Upload failed unexpectedly. A: Verify file size/type limits and retry.

item.title: Support Tickets
item.description:
Support Tickets page helps advisors track and resolve student-reported issues.

A) Open Support Tickets

  1. In sidebar, click Support Tickets.
  2. Wait for ticket list and summary cards.

B) Filter and Prioritize

  1. Filter by status (pending, in_progress, resolved, closed).
  2. Filter by priority (low, medium, high, urgent).
  3. Sort list for triage order.
  4. Open most urgent unresolved tickets first.

C) Review Ticket Details

  1. Click ticket row/card.
  2. Read subject and full description.
  3. Check user details and timestamps.
  4. Identify category and visibility context.

D) Update Ticket Status

  1. Open status control.
  2. Set new status (for example in_progress).
  3. Save update.
  4. Confirm status badge changed in list.

E) Add Resolution Message

  1. Open resolution input.
  2. Write clear resolution notes.
  3. Save and mark resolved when done.
  4. Close ticket when finalized.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Status changed but not persisted. A: Reopen ticket and verify update request succeeded.

item.title: Notifications
item.description:
Notifications allows advisors to send targeted announcements to students.

A) Open Notifications

  1. In sidebar, click Notifications.
  2. Wait for notification history list.

B) Create New Notification (Click-by-Click)

  1. Click Create Notification.
  2. Enter title.
  3. Enter message body.
  4. Choose target type:
    • All students
    • Selected users
    • Selected groups
  5. If users/groups selected, choose recipients.
  6. Click Send/Create.
  7. Confirm new notification appears in history.

C) Review Delivery Summary

In notification list, verify:

  • Target type
  • Created date/time
  • Total recipients
  • Read count
  • Unread count

D) Filter History

  1. Apply target-type filters.
  2. Search for a title or campaign keyword.
  3. Review historical effectiveness.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Notification sent to wrong audience. A: Recheck target type and recipient selection before sending.

item.title: Certificates and Application Documents
item.description:
This guide covers advisor certificate operations and application document review.

A) Certificates Workflow

  1. In sidebar, open Certificates.
  2. Review available certificate templates/items.
  3. Open template/detail.
  4. Configure issuance data as needed.
  5. Send/issue certificate to selected student(s).
  6. Confirm status (sent, pending, failed or equivalent).

B) Application Documents Overview

  1. In sidebar, open Application Documents.
  2. Review student collections list.
  3. Filter by status and review state.
  4. Open a student collection detail.

C) Review Student Documents (Click-by-Click)

  1. Open specific step/category in student collection.
  2. Open uploaded file metadata and preview/download.
  3. Set review status:
    • Verified
    • Invalid
    • Pending (if re-evaluation needed)
  4. If invalid, provide reason/comment.
  5. Save review outcome.

D) Collection-Level Status Updates

  1. Review completion progress.
  2. If complete and valid, move toward approval state.
  3. If missing/invalid files remain, return with revision request.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Student uploaded file but not visible. A: Refresh collection detail and verify step filter.

item.title: Sub-Advisor Management
item.description:
This guide explains how advisors create sub-advisors, assign permissions, and validate delegated access.

A) Open Sub-Advisor Area

  1. Sign in as advisor.
  2. Open sidebar.
  3. Click Sub-Advisor or Sub-Advisors module.
  4. Wait for list and permission context to load.

B) Create Sub-Advisor (Click-by-Click)

  1. Click Create Sub-Advisor.
  2. Fill required fields:
    • Full name
    • Email
    • Assigned scope/group access
    • Permission set
  3. Review selected permissions carefully.
  4. Click Save/Create.
  5. Confirm invitation/account provisioning success.

C) Configure Permissions

  1. Open sub-advisor record from list.
  2. Edit permission matrix (module/action level, if available).
  3. Adjust student/group visibility scope.
  4. Save changes.
  5. Verify effective access with test sign-in.

D) Validate Restricted Visibility

  1. Sign in as sub-advisor account.
  2. Open Students and Groups modules.
  3. Confirm only authorized cohorts are visible.
  4. Confirm restricted actions are hidden/disabled where expected.

E) Deactivate or Revoke Access

  1. Open sub-advisor account.
  2. Change status to inactive (or revoke access action).
  3. Save change.
  4. Verify sub-advisor can no longer access protected modules.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Sub-advisor cannot see any students. A: Check group/visibility assignment in permission scope.

item.title: Enrollment, Family Chat, and Assessments
item.description:
This guide combines operational modules often handled together by advisors.

A) Enrollment Requests

  1. In sidebar, click Enrollment Requests.
  2. Wait for request list to load.
  3. Open a request detail.
  4. Review requester and related context.
  5. Click Approve or Deny.
  6. Confirm status update in list.

B) Family Chat

  1. In sidebar, click Family Chat.
  2. Choose chat scope/tab (student or parent context).
  3. Open conversation.
  4. Type response in message input.
  5. Click Send.
  6. Confirm message appears in thread.

C) Student Chat Module

  1. Open Students Chat page if separate route is available.
  2. Select student thread.
  3. Continue support/guidance conversation.

D) Assessments Management

  1. In sidebar, click Assessments.
  2. Review available assessment items/templates.
  3. Create or adopt assessment depending on current flow.
  4. Configure metadata and visibility.
  5. Publish or assign according to process.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Enrollment action button is disabled. A: Confirm permission level and request status compatibility.

item.title: Profile, Prompts, and Interests
item.description:
This guide covers advisor profile settings and advanced content/configuration modules.

A) Profile Management

  1. In sidebar, click Profile.
  2. Review personal and organization details.
  3. Click Edit.
  4. Update text fields (name, bio, contact, organization data where available).
  5. Upload avatar/banner if supported.
  6. Click Save.
  7. Confirm updated preview.

B) Prompts Module

  1. In sidebar, click Prompts.
  2. Open prompt list by category/subcategory.
  3. Select prompt template to edit.
  4. Update content carefully.
  5. Validate syntax/placeholders.
  6. Save changes.
  7. Reopen to confirm version/state.

C) Interests Module

  1. In sidebar, click Interests.
  2. Review student interest records and statuses.
  3. Open detail for a student/entry.
  4. Update status or related metadata if action is available.
  5. Save and verify list refresh.

Best Practices

  • Keep prompt edits versioned and reviewed before broad usage.
  • Use profile info that matches advisor organization branding.
  • Process interests updates consistently to support recommendation quality.

Common Advisor Questions

Q: Prompt save failed. A: Check placeholder syntax and retry with valid template format.
